name: cws
description: Standalone server-v2 backend for CrossWord endpoint transport, auth, storage, and portable runtime

scripts.start:legacy:with-env: pm2 stop cws && cross-env CWS_ASSOCIATED_TOKEN=n3v3rm1nd CWS_AIRPAD_NATIVE_ACTIONS=true CWS_AIRPAD_ROBOTJS_ENABLED=true CWS_BRIDGE_REJECT_UNAUTHORIZED=false CWS_HTTPS_ENABLED=true CWS_HTTPS_KEY=./https/local/multi.key CWS_HTTPS_CERT=./https/local/multi.crt CWS_HTTPS_CA=./https/local/rootCA.crt CWS_CLIPBOARD_LOGGING=false CWS_PORTABLE_CONFIG_PATH=./portable.config.json CWS_PORTABLE_DATA_PATH=./.data tsx server/index.ts
scripts.start:pm2: pm2 start ecosystem.config.cjs --only cws --update-env && pm2 logs cws
scripts.start:pm2:vds-fake-client: pm2 start ecosystem.config.cjs --only cws-vds-fake-client --update-env && pm2 logs cws-vds-fake-client
scripts.stop:pm2: pm2 stop cws && pm2 delete cws || true
scripts.reload:pm2: pm2 reload cws --update-env || pm2 restart cws --update-env || npm run start:pm2
scripts.start:legacy:with-env:watch: cross-env CWS_AIRPAD_NATIVE_ACTIONS=true CWS_AIRPAD_ROBOTJS_ENABLED=true CWS_BRIDGE_REJECT_UNAUTHORIZED=false CWS_HTTPS_ENABLED=true CWS_HTTPS_KEY=./https/local/multi.key CWS_HTTPS_CERT=./https/local/multi.crt CWS_HTTPS_CA=./https/local/rootCA.crt CWS_CLIPBOARD_LOGGING=false CWS_PORTABLE_CONFIG_PATH=./portable.config.json CWS_PORTABLE_DATA_PATH=./.data tsx watch server/index.ts
scripts.start:legacy:fastify: cross-env CWS_AIRPAD_NATIVE_ACTIONS=true CWS_AIRPAD_ROBOTJS_ENABLED=true CWS_BRIDGE_REJECT_UNAUTHORIZED=false CWS_HTTPS_ENABLED=true CWS_HTTPS_KEY=./https/local/multi.key CWS_HTTPS_CERT=./https/local/multi.crt CWS_HTTPS_CA=./https/local/rootCA.crt CWS_CLIPBOARD_LOGGING=false CWS_PORTABLE_CONFIG_PATH=./portable.config.json CWS_PORTABLE_DATA_PATH=./.data tsx server/fastify-server.ts
scripts.start:legacy:fastify:watch: cross-env CWS_AIRPAD_NATIVE_ACTIONS=true CWS_AIRPAD_ROBOTJS_ENABLED=true CWS_BRIDGE_REJECT_UNAUTHORIZED=false CWS_HTTPS_ENABLED=true CWS_HTTPS_KEY=./https/local/multi.key CWS_HTTPS_CERT=./https/local/multi.crt CWS_HTTPS_CA=./https/local/rootCA.crt CWS_CLIPBOARD_LOGGING=false CWS_PORTABLE_CONFIG_PATH=./portable.config.json CWS_PORTABLE_DATA_PATH=./.data tsx watch server/fastify-server.ts
scripts.dev:legacy:with-env: pm2 stop cws && cross-env CWS_AIRPAD_NATIVE_ACTIONS=true CWS_AIRPAD_ROBOTJS_ENABLED=true CWS_BRIDGE_REJECT_UNAUTHORIZED=false CWS_HTTPS_ENABLED=true CWS_HTTPS_KEY=./https/local/multi.key CWS_HTTPS_CERT=./https/local/multi.crt CWS_HTTPS_CA=./https/local/rootCA.crt CWS_CLIPBOARD_LOGGING=false CWS_PORTABLE_CONFIG_PATH=./portable.config.json CWS_PORTABLE_DATA_PATH=./.data tsx server/index.ts
scripts.test:integration: echo "Integration tests not yet configured" && exit 0
